chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.728 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application --------------------------------------------- 23.04.2025 Mr. Muhammad Usman, advocate for applicant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------ Applicant Subhan alias Lool seeks post arrest bail in FIR No.263/2024, registered at P.S. Rizvia for offence under section 93(c) of the Control of Narcotic Substances (Amendment) Act, 2022, after rejection of his bail plea by learned Additional Sessions Judge-VII/MCTC-2, Karachi Central vide order dated 01.03.2025. Learned counsel for applicant, after arguing the bail application at some length, does not press the same and seeks direction to the trial Court to decide the case of the applicant preferably within a period of 2 months. Learned Additional Prosecutor General Sindh has recorded no objection on such proposal. In view of above, instant criminal bail application is dismissed as not pressed. However, learned trial Court is directed to decide the case of the applicant preferably within 2 months. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
